cards.title: Reference Artifact
cards.body: Video or retargeting artifacts corrupt the root-level reference.

cards.title: Robustness Budget
cards.body: Artifacts consume the frozen GMT tracker margin before real disturbances.

cards.title: Executable Gap
cards.body: A geometrically plausible reference can still be dynamically hard to execute.

cards.title: Geometric Repair Need
cards.body: What should be repaired in task-space SE(3).

cards.title: Executable Floor
cards.body: The GMT capability boundary used to judge whether a reference is executable.

cards.title: State Risk / Alpha
cards.body: Whether the current state needs conservative recovery before repair.

cards.title: Repair Retention / Rho
cards.body: How much of the repair should be retained under executable feedback.

cards.title: DR Frontier
cards.body: The training frontier that probes the GMT executable boundary.

cards.title: HSL Proposal
cards.body: Produces the clean-oriented task-space repair candidate.

cards.title: ExecutableFloor
cards.body: Centralizes floor value, safe/adapt decision, and diagnostics.

cards.title: State Alpha Branch
cards.body: Estimates state risk and conservative routing pressure.

cards.title: Structured Rho Update
cards.body: Updates repair retention through structured advantage feedback.

cards.title: DR Curriculum
cards.body: Samples perturbation strength near the recoverable frontier.

cards.title: Diagnostics
cards.body: Proves the live path and exposes concept-code mismatches.
